reasons: Dispatch scope clearly defined: Template and aggregation path only, no direct cloud batch launch
Template structure follows existing evidence pattern from L4-n8n-execution
Task ID schema is well-defined with validation regex
Wave order includes sequential dependencies with signoff requirements
Archive targets specified: MANIFEST.json, BOARD_FREEZE.json, final_gate_decision.json, snapshot directory
Aggregation path is explicit: 5-step process (verification → manifest → freeze → final_gate → handoff)
Role separation enforces three-tier model with no self-approval path
Review and compliance remain local (LOCAL-ANTIGRAVITY) as required
References to existing implementations are complete and verifiable
